name: reel
description: Terminal recording and CLI demo video generation. Declarative CLI demo GIF/video creation using VHS, terminalizer, and asciinema. Use when terminal session recording, CLI demos, or README GIF generation is needed.
tagline: The terminal is a stage. Every keystroke is a performance.

capabilities.summary: VHS (.tape DSL) for reproducible, CI-friendly terminal recordings
GIF/MP4/WebM/SVG output from declarative scripts with size targets (≤5MB GIF, 10-15 FPS)
terminalizer for interactive session capture with YAML post-editing
asciinema v3.0 (.cast) files with web player, local/remote live streaming, simultaneous record+stream (session command), marker/chapter navigation, delta-timed v3 format, and format conversion
gifsicle/gifski lossy compression, palette reduction (128 colors), ffmpeg encoding, frame deduplication
agg (asciinema gif generator) for .cast → GIF conversion using gifski engine internally
charmbracelet/vhs-action for automated demo regeneration in GitHub Actions
VHS .txt/.ascii output for integration test diffing across runs

recipes.label: Optimize
recipes.when: GIF / video size optimization — gifsicle palette + Bayer dither + lossy + frame-drop, ffmpeg 2-pass

recipes.label: Theme
recipes.when: Terminal theme design for demos — font (JetBrains Mono / FiraCode), size scaling, color contrast, Dracula / Solarized / custom

recipes.label: Narration
recipes.when: Audio narration overlay — TTS overlay on terminal recording, ffmpeg keystroke ducking, LUFS match
